content: ICM curiosity mechanisms can be redesigned to actively avoid overloading an LLM agent's working memory by rewarding the agent for chunking novel exploratory information into bounded working memory slots, rather than rewarding raw discovery of new information alone. This reframes ICM from a driver of unconstrained exploration to a regulator that aligns curiosity with the agent's inherent working memory capacity limits.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
